title: Canonical Recipe Registry Bootstrap
purpose: Establish the canonical recipe registry as the single source of truth for executable operational intents. Recipes must be machine-readable, topology-addressable, composable, and governable. No operational meaning shall be hardcoded in dashboard or control plane code.
architectural_constraints: Recipes must define intent, not implementation
Recipe registry must be JSON-native and schema-validated
Every recipe must declare replaySafe, requiresApproval, emits, rollback, and guards
Dashboard and control plane must consume recipes, never define them
Recipes must be discoverable via governance query layer

deliverables.description: Sample enforcement recipe: run all validation gates
Sample healing recipe: projection drift repair
Sample diagnostics recipe: quick health assessment
Sample orchestration recipe: formal milestone closure sequence

acceptance_criteria: Recipe schema validates all mandatory properties: id, version, category, description, inputs, guards, steps, emits, rollback, requiresApproval, replaySafe
At least 4 sample recipes exist across enforcement, healing, diagnostics, and orchestration categories
Recipes are discoverable via governance query layer (npm run governance:query)
Recipe registry directory structure is established and documented
No dashboard or control plane code hardcodes operational semantics
